title: dianthera nodosa
intro: Dianthera nodosa, also known as Moneywort or Blue Buttons, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Dianthera nodosa is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used fresh in salads or as a garnish.
